data.name: Demon's Soulbound
data.detailed_description:
One small mistake was all it took. Now your soul belongs to a demon. He'll make sure to let you feel his power over you. There is no escape, only eternal submission and servitude. You'll find that your new master is very demanding. Better serve him well, little soul.

Demon's Soulbound is a gay / bara adult 3rd person point'n click adventure with mouse controls. It's an adventure first and foremost, but contains gay sex scenes between adult men involving domination & bdsm, transformation, macro/micro situations and more.

| Story

After botching a summoning ritual, Nikolas finds himself at the mercy of the powerful demon Arakk. Nik hopes to get the beast to help him save his friend, but Arakk seems to have other plans, now that he has a new plaything.

Maybe there are ways to get the demon to help. There must be something like a heart buried under all that hard skin and muscle. Could Arakk become an ally, or maybe even a friend?

Among dragons, orcs and monsters, being a demon's slave doesn't seem to be that unusual.

| Features

  • Classic point'n click adventure gameplay: items, puzzles and dialog options

  • A fantasy world with orcs, goblins, demons, dragons and more

  • Many optional sex scenes with orcs, monsters and demons

  • A medium length adventure

  • Some QoL stuff like fast-traveling and fast-forward (hold space)

  • 3d and 3rd person

data.short_description: Demon's Soulbound is a gay bara adult 3rd person point'n click adventure about domination, bdsm, sex between men and monsters, and serving a demon master.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz / Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 970 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 3 GHz / Quad Core
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1080 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
